form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.19) when fifth over 300m at this track in a Mix 2/3. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed nine times. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 9 over 350m at Q Straight behind Electric Man beaten 6 lengths (19.48) in a Mix 5. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished 4th on April 5 over 350m at Grafton behind Robell Clyde beaten 7 lengths (20.44) in a Mix 2/3. Still to win from this draw but has been in the placings five times. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Fast starter. Last start finished 4th on April 5 over 350m at Grafton behind Robell Clyde beaten 7 lengths (20.44) in a Mix 2/3. Still to win from this draw but has been in the placings five times. Top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels rounding the turn into the home straight.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 17.74 over 300m at this track. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 17.74 over 300m at this track. In the money last time and looks well placed to go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened in the back straight and made contact with the rail as a result.
Heels galloped on and lost ground rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 6 over 300m at this track in a NG. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, Last start finished fifth over 300m at this track, beaten 3.5 lengths. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.
